name: agentstack-mcp
description: AgentStack MCP server for VS Code: 8DNA hierarchical data, Rules Engine, Buffs, Payments, 60+ tools (Projects, Auth, Scheduler, Analytics, Webhooks, Notifications, Wallets).

commands.title: AgentStack: Create project and get API key
AgentStack: Show API key & project info
AgentStack: Show project data in editor
AgentStack: Open project settings in editor
AgentStack: Save project settings from editor

chatParticipants.name: agentstack
chatParticipants.description: Backend: projects, 8DNA data, Rules Engine, Buffs, Payments, 60+ MCP tools

commands.name: createProject
commands.description: Create a new project and get API key

commands.name: getStats
commands.description: Get stats for a project (add project name or ID in chat)

commands.name: setApiKey
commands.description: Open dialog to set or change AgentStack API key

disambiguation.description: The user wants to create or manage AgentStack projects, use the data store (8DNA), set up rules, buffs, payments, or call AgentStack MCP tools.
examples: Set up a trial with Buffs

agentstack-mcp.apiKey.description: AgentStack API key. Get one via command 'AgentStack: Create project and get API key' or from agentstack.tech. If empty, the key from secure storage (Set API Key command) is used.

agentstack-mcp.baseUrl.description: MCP server base URL. Change only for self-hosted AgentStack.

agentstack-mcp.enableChatParticipant.description: Enable the @agentstack chat participant in Chat (60+ MCP tools).

agentstack-mcp.requestTimeoutSeconds.description: Request timeout in seconds for MCP/server calls (1–300).

agentstack-mcp.debugChatResponse.description: Log chat response path (text vs stream) and first chunk types to Output → AgentStack MCP. Use for debugging garbled output.

agentstack-mcp.stripKnownArtifacts.description: Remove known host/tool artifacts from chat output (e.g. projects.get_projects, Tool:, :202--T::Z). Set to false to see raw stream.

mcpServerDefinitionProviders.label: AgentStack
mcpServerDefinitionProviders.description: AgentStack backend: projects, 8DNA data store, Rules Engine, Buffs, Payments, Auth, Scheduler, Analytics, Webhooks, Notifications. 60+ MCP tools. Requires API key (command: AgentStack: Create project and get API key).

chatSkills.name: agentstack-projects
chatSkills.description: Create and manage AgentStack projects and API keys via MCP (projects.*). Use when the user wants to create a project, get an API key, list or inspect projects, get stats, or attach an anonymous project to an account.

chatSkills.name: agentstack-8dna
chatSkills.description: AgentStack 8DNA (JSON+): structured JSON data store with variants (e.g. A/B tests). Use when the user mentions data store, database, structured data, A/B tests, or project/user data (project.data, user.data).

chatSkills.name: agentstack-buffs
chatSkills.description: Trials, subscriptions, and effects in AgentStack via MCP (buffs.*). Use when the user asks about trials, promos, subscriptions, applying effects, or giving N days of premium.

chatSkills.name: agentstack-rules
chatSkills.description: Rules Engine: when/then automation, triggers via MCP (logic.*, rules.*). Use when the user asks for automation, triggers, event-driven logic, or "when X do Y".

chatSkills.name: agentstack-assets
chatSkills.description: Assets: inventory, digital goods, catalog via MCP (assets.*). Use when the user asks about inventory, in-game items, trading, or catalog.

chatSkills.name: agentstack-rbac
chatSkills.description: RBAC: roles, permissions, project membership via MCP. Use when the user asks about roles, permissions, admins, or project membership.

chatSkills.name: agentstack-payments
chatSkills.description: Payments & Wallets via MCP (payments.*, wallets.*). Use when the user asks about payments, refunds, wallet balance, or transactions.

chatSkills.name: agentstack-auth
chatSkills.description: Auth: login, register, profile via MCP (auth.*). Use when the user asks about login, sign in, register, or profile. For roles use RBAC skill.
